ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot sweeping using a broom.  The robot uses both arms, mimicking a human sweeping motion. The movement will be fluid and natural. The left arm will hold the broom while the right arm will guide the sweeping motion. I'll create a sequence of 4 frames, showing the starting pose, the sweeping motion, the transition, and the final pose.  I'll pay close attention to the robot's joint limitations and use the examples to guide my joint and wrist adjustments for a natural-looking sweep.

frames.beat: arms hold broom steady, ready to sweep
right arm pushes broom across the floor
right arm pulls broom back, preparing for next sweep
arms hold broom down, sweep complete
